resources.string: Let\'s pick some defaults. You can always change these things later in the settings.

Select a folder where %1$s will store chapter downloads, backups, and more.

A dedicated folder is recommended.

Selected folder: %2$s
Updating from an older version and not sure what to select? Refer to the Tachiyomi upgrade section on the Mihon storage guide for more information.
To install the app on updates.
Get notified for library updates and more.
Avoid interruptions to long-running library updates, downloads, and backup restores.
Pick how categories appear in your library. You can switch any time from settings.
All categories scroll together in a single list, with category headers between them.
Each category gets its own tab at the top, so only one category is visible at a time.
Entries in this category will moved into the default category.
A category with that name already exists!
Press and hold to edit a category
Your library is empty, add series to your library from the browse tab.
No matches found for your current filters
Move collapsed dynamic categories to bottom
When grouping library by sources, status, etc.
Mark duplicate read chapter as read
Can also be found by expanding library filters
Tap the Library icon to show filters
Allowing notifications is recommended to keep your library and app up to date.
Large updates may lead to increased battery usage and sources becoming slower. Matsa don ƙarin koyo.
Warning: large bulk downloads may lead to sources becoming slower and/or blocking Tachiyomi. Matsa don ƙarin koyo.
Skipped because there are unread chapters
Skipped because no chapters are read
Skipped because series does not require updates
No update errors from the last run.
No titles were skipped during the last run.
No library update has run yet.
Only update series if there is no unread chapter (completely read)
Update only when the conditions are met
When sorting alphabetically, sort ignoring articles (a, an, the) at the start of a series\' title
Categories to include in global update
Refresh covers in library as well when updating library
Certain buttons can be found in other places if disabled here
Search tips will show up periodically. Long press the suggestion to search it.
This will remove the read date of \"%1$s\". Ka tabbata?
No recently read or updated series
Press and hold can also reset chapter history
Are you sure? All history will be lost.
Show read chapters in Grouped and All
Duk bayanan da aka ɓoye na wannan shafin za a dawo dasu.
Shigar kuma fara Shizuku don amfani da Shizuku azaman mai sakawa mai tsawo.
Yana ba da damar haɓaka haɓakawa ba tare da faɗakarwar mai amfani ba kuma yana ba da damar sabuntawa ta atomatik don na'urori ƙarƙashin Android 12
Har yanzu ba a aiwatar da mai sakawa Legacy ba, a halin yanzu yana komawa zuwa PackageInstaller (Default)
Ƙwaƙwalwar ɓarna na iya karanta duk wani bayanan shaidar shiga da aka adana ko kuma aiwatar da lambar sabani.
This extension is no longer available.
Wannan tsawo baya daga lissafin kari na Tachiyomi na hukuma.
Dole ne a kashe inganta MIUI don shigar da kari.
Wasu kari na iya har yanzu sa a fara shigar da su.
Use this image as cover art?
Changing this will reset the reading mode for this series
The amount of pages to preload when reading. Higher values will result in a smoother reading experience, at the cost of higher cache and network usage.
Reduces banding, but may impact yi
If disabled, the transition page will be skipped if the next chapter is loaded
Cutout area behavior only applies in portrait mode with certain scale types
On devices older than Android 9.0, you need to set cutout settings manually through your system settings
While using automatic page layout, you can still switch between layouts while reading without overriding this setting
Creates folders according to manga title
Sensitivity for hiding menu on scroll
If reader loads a blank image incrementally reduce the threshold.\nSelected: %s
This entry\'s details page must be viewed before being able to migrate
You have an entry in your library with the same name but from a different source (%1$s).\n\nDo you still wish to continue?
Sync your reading progress with your services
Couldn’t search %1$s. Check your connection and try again.
Your %1$s session has expired. Sign in again to keep tracking.
Series must be in your library to edit
Source %1$d is still loading. Retry once installed plugins finish registering.
One-way sync to update the chapter progress in tracking services. Set up tracking for individual entries from their tracking button.
Services that provide enhanced features for specific sources. Entries are automatically tracked when added to your library.
Update tracking when marked as read
Tracker cannot be removed from %1$s while offline
Keep both on %1$s and only replace locally
Please log in to MAL again
Yi amfani da kwanan wata shawara
Select a source, then select an item to migrate
Include extra search parameter when searching
Use source with the most chapters (slower)
To show this screen again, go to Settings -> Sources.
No chapters found, this series cannot be used for ƙaura
Amintaccen allo yana ɓoye abubuwan da ke cikin app lokacin da ake canza ƙa'idodi da toshe hotunan kariyar kwamfuta
Ta hanyar tsoho, ana amfani da kewayawa gefe don wasu wayoyi da ƙananan allunan lokacin da ke cikin shimfidar wuri, kuma koyaushe yana nunawa akan manyan allunan.
Sanya lafazin shafi na manga, rubutun kai da launukan babi ta amfani da palette na murfin
Nuna babban mashaya mai faɗaɗawa a saman yawancin shafuka (ba ya nunawa akan ƙananan na'urori ba tare da la'akari da saiti ba)
Kashe canjin allo da sauran raye-rayen in-app
Wasu harsuna na iya buƙatar sake buɗe app don nunawa daidai
Ya haɗa da karantawa kwanan nan, sabuntawa, da ƙarin jerin abubuwa
Lokacin da babu sabon babi, jerin bayanan za su buɗe maimakon haka
Can be used to restore current library
Fayil na wariyar ajiya mara inganci
Invalid backup file type: %1$s\nIt should end with ".proto.gz" or ".json".
Backup does not contain any entries.
No library entries to back up
Za a maido da bayanai daga fayil ɗin wariyar ajiya.\n\n Kuna buƙatar shigar da duk wani kari da ya ɓace sannan ku shiga ayyukan bin diddigin bayan haka don amfani da su.
Automatic backups are highly recommended. You should keep copies in other places as well.
What do you want to backup?
Backup/restore may not function properly if MIUI Optimization is disabled.
Include sensitive settings (e.g. tracker login tokens)
Force app to recheck downloaded chapters
Try new features before they\'re officially released. Beta releases may be unstable and are provided to give feedback to the developer.
Rolling back to the previous production version may cause issues and could require clearing app data.
Beta releases may be unstable and could require clearing app data.
Saves error logs to a file for sharing with the developers
Some manufacturers have additional app restrictions that kill background services. This website has more info on how to fix it.
Print verbose logs to system log (may reduces app performance)
Requires app restart to take effect
Delete history for entries that are not saved in your library
Are you sure? Read chapters and progress of non-library entries will be lost
Updates covers, genres, description and entries status information
Updates status, score and last chapter read from the tracking services
Delete non-existent, partially downloaded, and read chapter folders
Disable this if you are experiencing issues with updating or restoring your library
Delete old and unused cached covers of entries in your library that has been updated.\nCurrently using: %1$s
Clear cached covers not in library
Delete all covers cached that are not in your library \nCurrently using: %1$s
Some extensions may not be auto-updated if they were installed outside this app
Only enable your pinned sources for ƙaura
Only enable your currently enabled sources for ƙaura
Use last saved pre-migration preferences and sources to mass migrate
You can also migrate by selecting entries in your ɗakin karatu
Show in sources and extensions lists
This does not prevent unofficial or potentially incorrectly flagged extensions from surfacing NSFW (18+) content within the app.
Couldn’t add this repository. Check the URL and your connection, then try again.
Couldn’t refresh repositories. Check your connection and try again.
Paste the full index.min.json URL supplied by the repository maintainer.
Paste a repository URL to validate its index and make its novel sources available.
No manga repositories yet. Add one above to browse more extensions.
No novel repositories yet. Add one above to browse novel sources.
Novel repo is empty. Add a repo that contains novel sources.
Cire "%s" daga wannan na'urar? Kuna iya ƙara shi daga baya.
Maɓallin sa hannu na ma'adanar ana amfani da shi
“%1$s” uses the same signing key as “%2$s”. Replace “%2$s” only if you trust “%1$s” as its intended successor.
Helps fix any bugs. Ba za a aika bayanai masu mahimmanci ba
Menene sabo a cikin wannan sakin
Sunan mai amfani ko kalmar sirri ba zai zama fanko ba
Downloads can be cancelled by swiping them away\nSwipe this tip to dismiss it
Ziyarci shafin kwanan nan don samun damar zazzagewa queue. You can also double tap or press and hold for quicker access
Couldn\'t download chapters due to low disk space
Shafi %d ba a samo shi ba yayin rarrabuwa
May fix issue with downloaded chapters conflicts with one another when they have the same name
Could not download chapter due to unexpected error
Yana aiki kawai akan shigarwar a cikin ɗakin karatu kuma idan an riga an zazzage babin na yanzu da na gaba
Delete downloaded chapters if the source has removed the chapter online
Share yayin sabuntawar duniya, tambaya a shafi na babi
Lokacin da aka kashe a cikin mai karatu, bisa tarihin babi
No data found for your current filters
Failed to acquire persistent folder access. The app may behave unexpectedly.
Tap here for help with Cloudflare
Da fatan za a sabunta ƙa'idar WebView don ingantaccen dacewa
WebView is required for the app to function
See your recently updated library entries
Widget not available when app lock is enabled
Yi alama duka kamar yadda aka karanta
Mark a range of chapters as read
Mark a range of chapters as unread
Shin kun tabbata kuna son share tambayar bincikenku da aka adana: \'%1$s\'?
Kuskuren da ba a sani ba
%s ran into an unexpected error. Muna ba ku shawarar ɗaukar hoton wannan saƙon, zubar da rajistan ayyukan, sannan ku raba shi zuwa Batun GitHub.

Do you wish to load images through the Hentai@Home Network, if available? Kashe wannan zaɓin zai rage adadin shafukan da za ku iya dubawa
Zaɓuɓɓuka:
- Duk wani abokin ciniki (An shawarce shi)
- Abokan ciniki na tashar tashar jiragen ruwa kawai (Za a iya yin hankali. Kunna idan bayan Firewall/proxy wanda ke toshe tashoshin jiragen ruwa marasa daidaituwa.)
Abokan ciniki na tashar tashar jiragen ruwa kawai
Nuna taken Jafananci a cikin sakamakon bincike
Currently showing Japanese titles in search results. Clear the chapter cache after changing this (in the Advanced section)
Currently showing English/Romanized titles in search results. Clear the chapter cache after changing this (in the Advanced section)
Yi amfani da hotuna na asali
A halin yanzu ana amfani da hotuna na asali
A halin yanzu ana amfani da hotunan da aka sake kwatance
Opens a webview to your E/ExHentai watched tags page
Dole ne ya kasance tsakanin -9999 da 0!

You can soft filter tags by adding them to the \"My Tags\" E/ExHentai page with a negative weight. If a gallery has tags that add up to weight below this value, it is filtered from view. This threshold can be set between -9999 and 0. Currently: %1$d
Dole ne ya kasance tsakanin 0 da 9999!

Za a saka hotunan hotunan da aka ɗora kwanan nan akan allon kallo idan yana da aƙalla alamar kallo ɗaya mai nauyi mai kyau, kuma jimillar ma'aunin nauyi akan tags ɗinsa na kallo yana ƙara darajar ko sama da haka. This threshold can be set between 0 and 9999. Currently: %1$d

If you wish to hide galleries in certain languages from the gallery list and searches, select them in the dialog that will popup.\nNote that matching galleries will never appear regardless of your search query.\nTldr checkmarked = exclude
What categories would you like to show by default on the front page and in searches? They can still be enabled by enabling their filters
When browsing ExHentai/E-Hentai should the watched list filter be enabled by default
The quality of the downloaded images
Enable/Disable the enhanced browse menu made for E/ExHentai

Favorites are only downloaded from ExHentai. Any changes to favorites in the app will not be uploaded. Prevents accidental loss of favorites on ExHentai. Note that removals will still be downloaded (if you remove a favorites on ExHentai, it will be removed in the app as well).
Show some information regarding the favorites sync feature

Do not abort immediately when encountering errors during the sync process. Errors will still be displayed when the sync is complete. Can cause loss of favorites in some cases. Useful when syncing large libraries.

Performs a full resynchronization on the next sync. Removals will not be synced. All favorites in the app will be re-uploaded to ExHentai and all favorites on ExHentai will be re-downloaded into the app. Useful for repairing sync after sync has been interrupted.
%1$s Sync will not start until the gallery is in only one category.
An error occurred during the sync process: %1$s
Errors occurred during the sync process that were ignored:\n%1$s
Failed to fetch favorites from remote server!
Unable to delete galleries from the remote servers!
Adding gallery %1$d of %2$d to remote server
Unable to add gallery to remote server: \'%1$s\' (GID: %2$s)!
Ana cire gallery %1$d na %2$d daga laburare na gida
Adding gallery %1$d of %2$d to local library
Ba a wanzuwar gidan wasan kwaikwayo mai nisa, tsallakewa: %1$s!
Failed to add gallery to local database:
Gidan hoton: %1$s yana cikin nau'i sama da ɗaya (%2$s)!
%1$s\n\nA halin yanzu Sync yana dakushewa (don gujewa dakatar da shi daga ExHentai) kuma yana iya ɗaukar lokaci mai tsawo ana gamawa.

1. Changes to category names in the app are NOT synced! Please change the category names on ExHentai instead. The category names will be copied from the ExHentai servers every sync.

2. The favorite categories on ExHentai correspond to the first 10 categories in the app (excluding the \'Default\' category). Galleries in other categories will NOT be synced!

3. ENSURE YOU HAVE A STABLE INTERNET CONNECTION WHEN SYNC IS IN PROGRESS! If the internet disconnects while the app is syncing, your favorites may be left in a partially-synced state.

4. Keep the app open while favorites are syncing. Android will close apps that are in the background sometimes and that could be bad if it happens while the app is syncing.

5. Do NOT put favorites in multiple categories (the app supports this). This can confuse the sync algorithm as ExHentai only allows each favorite to be in one category.

This dialog will only popup once. You can read these notes again by going to \'Settings > E-Hentai > Show favorites sync notes\'.
Resetting the sync state can cause your next sync to be extremely slow.
Are you sure you wish to sync your favorites with E-Hentai?
%1$s will currently never check galleries in your library for updates.
%1$s checks/updates galleries in batches. This means it will wait %2$d hour(s), check %3$d galleries, wait %2$d hour(s), check %3$d and so on…
The updater last ran %1$s, and checked %2$d out of the %3$d galleries that were ready for checking.
The updater has not ran yet.

Galleries that were checked in the last:
- hour: %1$d
- 6 hours: %2$d
- 12 hours: %3$d
- day: %4$d
- 2 days: %5$d
- week: %6$d
- month: %7$d
- year: %8$d

The app will now add a new settings profile on E-Hentai and ExHentai to optimize app performance. Please ensure that you have less than three profiles on both sites.\n\nIf you have no idea what settings profiles are, then it probably doesn\'t matter, just hit \'OK\'.
An error occurred during the configuration process: %1$s
Please wait, this may take some time…
You are out of profile slots on %1$s, please delete a profile!
Some users cannot access ExHentai the normal way, and have to pass in a specific igneous cookie value, this option is for those users.
Failed to refresh igneous cookie. Make sure you are logged in to E-Hentai and have ExHentai access.
This is a experimental feature that will disable all hentai features if toggled off
Apply %1$s enhancements to the following sources if they are installed: %2$s
Hide extensions/sources that are incompatible with %1$s. Force-restart app after changing.

Example:

http://e-hentai.org/g/12345/1a2b3c4e
http://g.e-hentai.org/g/67890/6f7g8 h9i
http://exhentai.org/g/13579/1a3b5c7e
https://exhentai.org/g/24680/2f4g6h8i

It also supports E-H Visited exported data
Enter the galleries to add (separated by a new line):
Babu gidajen tarihi da za a ƙara!
You must specify at least one gallery to add!
Failed to update chapters for gallery: %1$s!
Jimlar abubuwan da aka fi so
Automatically scroll to the next page in the specified interval. Interval is specified in seconds.
Re-add all failed pages to the download queue.

Normally the downloader can only download a specific amount of pages at the same time. This means you can be waiting for a page to download but the downloader will not start downloading the page until it has a free download slot. Pressing \'Boost page\' will force the downloader to begin downloading the current page, regardless of whether or not there is an available slot.
This page cannot be boosted (invalid page)!
Page failed to load, press the retry button instead!
This page has already been downloaded!
This page cannot be boosted (invalid page loader)!
This entry is already merged with the current entry!
This merged entry is a duplicate!
This will remove the entry from the merge, using this will also lose any unsaved changes applied to the merged entry
Sync MangaDex entries to your library
Pulls entries from MangaDex into your library if they are not already added.
Set your chosen MangaDex source, this will be used for follows and a bunch more features around the app
Syncs any non MdList tracked entries to MangaDex as reading.
Couldn\'t find the entry in the source!
An error occurred while loading your saved searches.
Shin kun tabbata kuna son share tambayar bincikenku da aka adana: \'%1$s\'?
Saved search invalid, filters have changed
Select which categories to show on the front page
Hide results already in your library
An error occurred during the search process: %1$s
Kada ku ƙara girman hotuna ƙasa da girman manufa
Duba lokaci kuma kirga cikakkun bayanai daga binciken sabuntawa na ƙarshe
Gudun binciken sabuntawar gallery kawai lokacin da sharuɗɗan suka cika
Shiga don samun damar bibiyar MangaDex da matsayi na karantawa
Shigo da MangaDex ɗinku yana bi zuwa ɗakin karatu na gida
Tura shigarwar ɗakin karatu na gida zuwa jerin abubuwan MangaDex na ku
Shiga zuwa NovelUpdates, sannan danna maɓallin ✓ don kammala shiga.
Shiga zuwa NovelList, sannan danna maɓallin ✓ don kammala shiga.
Login, then tap the ✓ button to complete.
Page viewers, double-tap, fullscreen, color filter
Text rendering, themes, TTS, custom CSS / JS
Preserve fonts from the source website
Break long paragraphs at sentence boundaries
Tap-to-scroll uses the navigator zones (top/bottom of the screen); double-tap and long-press fire anywhere and route to the action you pick above.
No app installed to handle Define
No app installed to handle Translate
Allow novel chapters to be translated
Manage engines, languages, cache, and provider setup
Render translated chapter text in the novel reader
Serve translated chapters from local cache instead of calling the API again
Skip translation when the detected language already matches the target
Simple is fast provider translation; advanced uses per-series canon and glossary memory
Send previous translated paragraphs as context to LLM engines
Suna: Ƙimar nau'i-nau'i da aka raba ta hanyar tsaka-tsaki ko karya layi
%1$s na iya aiki ba tare da maɓalli ba a Hayai. Idan ya daina aiki, zaɓi injin mai goyon bayan API ko na gida.
ChatGPT Plus/Pro da biyan kuɗin Google AI ba sa samar da damar API zuwa Hayai. Yi amfani da maɓallin API, wurin ƙarshe mai jituwa na OpenAI, ko injin gida kamar Ollama.
Har yanzu babu wani fassarar fassarar da ta nun
Babu abubuwan da suka faru tukuna
Choose which source provides each manga info field
Choose which enriched sections are visible for this series
Reset display options to global defaults
No app installed to handle Web Search
Run scripts embedded in EPUB chapters (off for security)
Block images and embedded media in both readers
Tap a paragraph to start TTS there
Continue TTS while the reader is closed; shows a persistent notification
More TTS options are available inside the reader (long-press TTS button).
Babu dokoki. Matsa + don ƙara ɗaya.
Maps stylized text (𝒇𝓻𝓮𝓮 → free, ｆｒｅｅ → free) and strips invisible joiners so rules match obfuscated promos.
Removes all non-ASCII characters. Leave OFF for Japanese/Chinese/Korean novels.
Shin kun tabbata kuna son share wannan magana?
No quotes saved. Danna rubutu a cikin babi don ƙara ɗaya.
Babu abun ciki na rubutu samuwa
Ana hasashen sabbin babi a kusa da %1$s, ana duba kowane %2$s.
An kammala wannan silsilar ko ba shi da annabta ranar fitowa tukuna.
Yi hasashen lokacin sakin don sabunta ɗakin karatu, cikakkun bayanai na manga, da fitowar masu zuwa.
Yi hasashen lokacin fitarwa na gaba
An tsallake saboda ba a tsammanin sakin ba tukuna
Har yanzu ba a fitar da annabta ba
Babu fitowar da aka annabta a wannan watan
Aiwatar da atomatik babi na gaba a
Yi alama ga gajerun surori kamar yadda ake karantawa
Ba da fifiko ga tushen/EPUB CSS
M talla & cire haɗin haɗin gwiwa
A preset with this name already exists
